differential_diagnoses: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (COVID-19) pneumonia with cytokine storm
next_steps: Send serum for Leptospira microscopic agglutination test (MAT) and PCR
Order peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic parasites to rule out Babesia
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage with sampling for microbiology, cytology, and PCR testing
Request serology for Hantavirus and Rickettsial diseases
Send blood and urine for Legionella antigen testing
Monitor renal function closely with potential initiation of continuous renal replacement therapy if clinical status deteriorates
Consult infectious disease, nephrology, and pulmonary critical care services

differential_diagnoses: Rickettsial disease (e.g., Anaplasmosis or Rickettsia typhi)
Acute viral hepatitis with secondary organ dysfunction
next_steps: Send blood and urine for Leptospira PCR and serum for MAT
Perform peripheral blood smear evaluation for intraerythrocytic parasites (Babesia/Malaria)
Obtain coagulation panel (PT/INR/PTT) and fibrinogen to assess for DIC
Send serum for viral hepatitis panel (A, B, C, E) and CMV/EBV serology
Order G6PD, haptoglobin, LDH, and reticulocyte count to evaluate hemolysis
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage with caution after addressing coagulopathy if hypoxia persists
Maintain high-flow oxygen and initiate continuous renal replacement therapy if anuria or severe metabolic acidosis develops
Consider early switch to or addition of intravenous penicillin G if Leptospirosis is suspected
